title: Taxi Srima | TAXI Antonio
description: Taxi Srima: fixed airport transfers to Split and Zadar (€110), runs into Šibenik, and lifts to the Vodice ferry for Prvić. Doorstep pickup.
keywords: taxi srima, srima taxi, srima vodice taxi, srima airport transfer, srima to split airport, srima to zadar airport

schema.name: Taxi Srima
schema.description: Private fixed-price taxi from Srima, next to Vodice, to Split Airport, Zadar Airport and Šibenik, with drops at the Vodice island ferry.

mainEntity.name: Can you take me to the ferry for Prvić?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The island ferry to Prvić leaves from the Vodice landing next to Srima, and I can drop you there in a couple of minutes. Ask me for the fare when you book.

mainEntity.name: How much is Srima to the airports?

acceptedAnswer.text: Zadar Airport is a fixed €110 and Split Airport €115 per car for up to 4 passengers, tolls and luggage included.
